params.excludeProtocols: Comma-separated protocols to exclude (optional, pass "" for none).
params.minApyBps: Minimum acceptable APY in basis points (e.g. 1500 = 15%).
params.preferredChains: Comma-separated preferred chains (optional, pass "" for any).

deactivateMandate(address).notice: Deactivate a mandate (user opts out of auto-rebalance).

getMandateThreshold(address).notice: Check if a wallet's mandate is active and its threshold.

mandateHolders(uint256).notice: All wallets that have an active mandate

recordMandateCheck(address,uint256,bool).notice: CRE cron calls this after checking a user's current APY.         Records the check and whether a rebalance was triggered.

setMandate(address,uint256,string,string.notice: Set or update a rebalance mandate for a wallet.
